docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. ALMA DUARTE INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-05-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, SERGIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY SEQUEIRA, DAISY AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, SERGIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEQUEIRA, DAISY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GARCIA, SERGIO THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO PROVE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
